fromDate.description:
from date for Recommendation

Expected format - yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss. Note- The date is in UTC timezone instead of Local timezone.

Endpoints:
  • GET /views
  • GET /views/recommendation
  • POST /views
  • PUT /views

toDate.description:
to date for Recommendation.

Expected format - yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.Note- The date is in UTC timezone instead of Local timezone.

Endpoints:
  • GET /views
  • GET /views/recommendation
  • POST /views
  • PUT /views
